arts.ttl: Acerbi suffers muscle elongation, likely to miss Juventus clash
arts.sum: Inter Milan’s defensive woes have deepened as Francesco Acerbi joins Hakan Calhanoglu on the injury list following the team’s victory against Roma. The Italian defender underwent medical examinations today after experiencing muscular discomfort during the first half of the match at the Olimpico, and the results have confirmed the worst fears of the coaching staff. Acerbi was forced to leave the field in the 24th minute after a challenge with Dovbyk in midfield. He attempted to stretch the biceps femoris muscle in his left thigh on the pitch but was immediately replaced by De Vrij.
